name: lifeline
description: LIFELINE — a sustainable productivity dashboard. Public reads, owner writes.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @lifeline/server" "npm run dev -w @lifeline/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @lifeline/shared && npm run build -w @lifeline/server && npm run build -w @lifeline/client
